tavily.answer: Sri Lanka is facing severe dengue fever outbreak with over 44,000 cases and 28 deaths recorded since January, exacerbated by unplanned urbanization and damage from Cyclone Ditwah in late November. Additionally, a deadly clash in a Sri Lankan prison in July left at least 25 dead, mostly inmates. A fire at a nursing home in Anguruwatota in June resulted in 12 fatalities. These events highlight ongoing public health and security challenges in the country.
